title: spooky
description: This is a small mod made to scare you with sounds that play in caves.
body:
# Spoky 1.5.0
## News Zone 📰
#### **A creepy mod made for Rubius OMGG :p MASSIVE AMBIENT UPDATE AT 1,000 DOWNLOADS!!! PD: Sorry guys i dont have time to update the mod bc of school. More updates this summer!!**

# ⚙️ What does the mod include? ![huh?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad4b299cff8149facebca9d924bfe18a51916c2e.webp)

Below you can see all the features and all the sounds it adds to the game:

**1.** 16 scary cave sounds.

**2.** Heartbeat sounds when the player has less than 2 hearts away.

# ❓ What's the _dont-go-beyond-spoky0.0.1_ update about?

It's a simple joke update that adds random sounds in the world. Maybe there are more things to explore?..

# ☑️ Hardware Compatiblity

The mod, by adding only sound, is not very demanding. What we do recommend is to have at least **2GB of RAM** in your game, as some sounds are **stored in RAM**.

# 🔊 Mod Objetive

We want to make you have a new terrifying experience. We believe that through simple sounds we can make our players have a new experience when they are in the deep caves!

# 🪢 Version

Most likely, the mod will work perfectly with the most recent versions of Minecraft since no internal game files are modified. Feel free to try the mod with other versions of the game. I repeat, I'm sure it will work with recent versions.

# 🔧 Source

The mod, like many others, is open source, you can copy, edit and distribute the code. You can find the code [here](https://github.com/wonnd3r/spoky), or on the right/left side of the screen. **You CANNOT make economic profit from this mod.**
